heading: Cooperation with city of Providence and local historical and preservation societies
label: 450pp–2 Cooperation with city of Providence and local historical and preservation societies

children.heading: Maintenance, operation, and development
children.label: a Maintenance, operation, and development
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to cooperate with the city of Providence, local historical and preservation societies, and interested persons in the maintenance and operation of the Roger Williams National Memorial, and he may seek the assistance of and consult with such city, societies, and persons from time to time with respect to matters concerning the development and operation of the memorial.

children.heading: Acceptance of gifts
children.label: b Acceptance of gifts
children.text: The Secretary may accept on behalf of the people of the United States gifts of historic objects and records pertaining to Roger Williams for appropriate display or other use in keeping with the commemoration of the founding of the principles of freedom in the United States and of the historical events that took place in the city of Providence in connection therewith.
